CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(SMS_Reminder_Time_Offset__c) || ISPICKVAL(SMS_Reminder_Time_Unit__c, "") || ISBLANK(ActivityDateTime), NULL, IF( ISPICKVAL(SMS_Reminder_Time_Unit__c, "Hours Before"), ActivityDateTime - (SMS_Reminder_Time_Offset__c / 24), ActivityDateTime - SMS_Reminder_Time_Offset__c ) )
CustomField.label: SMS Reminder Date/Time
